name: M9 刺刀（★） | 人工染色
nameZh: M9 刺刀（★） | 人工染色
descriptionEn: This is the M-9 bayonet. Originally intended to be mounted on a rifle, it is also well suited to close-quarters combat. It has been given a forced patina using lemon and mustard dripped onto the surface. If you think it's messy now, wait until you see it under a blacklight
descriptionZh: 这是 M-9 刺刀。起初是装在步枪上面的，其同时还非常适合近距离作战。 通过将柠檬汁和芥末滴到这把武器的表面，它被人工地附上了氧化层。 你也许以为刀刃上一团糟，请在黑光灯源下瞧瞧吧
